.
Neptune and Mercury:
Paribhraman Neptune making good aspects to Mercury – is blessed with knowledge, makes
use of his power of imagination for progress; new vistas of imagination, writing novels, a
new spirit and life-force to the poets, sharp intelligence, intuition and foretelling dreams.
Visions and progress in relisous philosophy.
Paribhraman Neptune with bad aspects to Mercury: loses memory power, indecisive, fear,
cheat, infamy, false implication, mental illness. This period is bad for students- failures in
exams and will experience troubles in exams and travels.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
17

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Neptune and Venus:
Good aspects: Position in wealth and material benefits improves.
